name: io.github.tools-mcp/vessel-traffic-mcp
title: Vessel Traffic MCP
description: Read-only MCP server for vessel AIS, ship tracking, schedules, and BYOK maritime providers.

environmentVariables.name: VESSEL_MCP_TRANSPORT
environmentVariables.description: Run the package as a local stdio MCP server.

environmentVariables.name: VESSEL_MCP_ENABLE_PUBLIC_PROVIDERS
environmentVariables.description: Optional comma-separated public providers to enable at runtime.
